items.text: SPRING STAGE PRESENTS "The Lantern Keeper"! An original drama written and performed by students. April 17-19 at 7 p.m. in the Bramwell Theater, Fine Arts Building. Tickets are just $5 at the door. Seating is limited, so arrive early. Don't miss this unforgettable show!

questions.stem: According to the flyer, how much does a ticket cost?
questions.explanation: The flyer states 'Tickets just $5 at the door.'

questions.stem: In the flyer, the word "limited" is closest in meaning to
questions.explanation: "Seating is limited" means the number of available seats is restricted, which is why the flyer advises arriving early.

items.text: Dear Ravi, this is a reminder that your required lab safety training takes place on Thursday, March 6, at 1 p.m. in Room 210, Carver Science Hall. Please arrive a few minutes early to sign in. You can't enter the chemistry lab until this session is complete. Thanks, Dr. Olsen

questions.stem: According to the email, where will the safety training be held?

options.B: At the front office of the building
options.C: In a shared campus study lounge
options.D: In Room 210 of Carver Science Hall

questions.explanation: The email states the training takes place 'in Room 210, Carver Science Hall.'

questions.stem: What can be inferred about Ravi's access to the chemistry lab?

options.A: It depends on passing a written exam
options.B: It requires approval from another professor
options.C: It is limited to certain hours of the day
options.D: It is blocked until he finishes the training

questions.explanation: Because Ravi 'can't enter the chemistry lab until this session is complete,' his access is blocked until the training is finished.

items.text: Hi Priya, thank you for agreeing to join our memory research study. Your session is scheduled for Monday, May 11, at 3 p.m. in the Psychology Annex, Room 7. You'll receive $15 in compensation right after the session ends. Please bring your student ID. Best, Professor Lane

questions.stem: According to the email, how much will Priya be paid for taking part?
questions.explanation: The email states Priya 'will receive $15 in compensation right after the session ends.'

questions.stem: What can be inferred about how Priya will be paid?

options.A: She is paid before the study begins
options.B: She is paid once her session is finished
options.C: She is paid in weekly installments
options.D: She is paid only by bank transfer

questions.explanation: Since payment comes 'right after the session ends,' Priya receives it once her session is finished.

items.text: Hi Marcus, this confirms your math tutoring appointment with the Learning Center. We'll meet Wednesday at 4 p.m. in Room 118, Foster Hall. There is a $3 materials fee, payable at the desk. Please bring your homework so we can work through it. Thanks, Tara

questions.stem: According to the email, when is the tutoring appointment scheduled?
questions.explanation: The email states the meeting is 'Wednesday at 4 p.m. in Room 118, Foster Hall.'

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the tutoring session?

options.A: It is offered free of charge to students
options.B: It can be rescheduled only by phone
options.C: It involves reviewing Marcus's own assignments
options.D: It is held in a large group classroom

questions.explanation: Because Marcus is asked to bring his homework 'so we can work through it,' the session involves reviewing his own assignments.
